channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Notre Dame calls on fans to 'join us in prayer’ following apparent terror attack ahead of Sugar Bowl
item.description: The University of Notre Dame is calling on fans in New Orleans ahead of the Sugar Bowl to join in prayer following a "senseless act of violence" that left at least 10 people dead and injured more than two dozen others.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Westbrook's triple-double leads Denver past Utah
item.description: DENVER (AP) - Russell Westbrook became the second player in NBA history to have a triple-double with zero turnovers and shoot 100% from the field and the free-throw line in the Denver Nuggets' 132-121 win over the Utah Jazz on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lions beat the 49ers 40-34 in a tune-up for Week 18 division showdown
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The big prizes for the Detroit Lions remain on the horizon, with the team seeking a division title, the top seed in the NFC playoffs and the franchise's first Super Bowl trip.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers send D'Angelo Russell to Nets in trade for Dorian Finney-Smith, Shake Milton
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers have traded guard D'Angelo Russell to the Brooklyn Nets for forward Dorian Finney-Smith and guard Shake Milton. The Lakers also sent forward Maxwell Lewis and three second-round draft picks to Brooklyn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sportscaster Greg Gumbel dies from cancer at age 78
item.description: Greg Gumbel, a longtime CBS sportscaster who broke barriers during his career calling some of the biggest sporting events, has died from cancer, according to a statement from his family released by the network on Friday. He was 78.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Syracuse defeats Washington State in DIRECTV Holiday Bowl
item.description: Syracuse quarterback Kyle McCord put on a stellar performance Friday to help his team win the DIRECTV Holiday Bowl at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Holiday Bowl to kick off at brand-new Snapdragon Stadium for the first time
item.description: The Holiday Bowl has been woven into the fabric of San Diego for four decades. For a football city without a professional sports team, there is even more excitement surrounding this annual event.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5
